test_name: Batch Creation with Positional References Test

1_clean_state.description: Deleted thoughtflow-state.json and used clear_state tool

2_task_batch_creation_with_positional_re.description: Created 4 tasks with dependencies using positional references (task-1, task-2, task-3, task-4)
2_task_batch_creation_with_positional_re.expected: All 4 tasks created, dependencies resolved from positional refs, idMap returned
2_task_batch_creation_with_positional_re.actual: 4 tasks created successfully. Task 2 depends on Task 1 (setup-database), Task 3 depends on Task 2 (create-tables), Task 4 depends on Task 2 (create-tables). idMap: {task-1: setup-database, task-2: create-tables, task-3: seed-data, task-4: add-indexes}

3_task_batch_creation_with_parent_child_.description: Created 4 tasks with parent-child using positional references
3_task_batch_creation_with_parent_child_.expected: All 4 tasks created, parentTaskId resolved, subtasks retrievable
3_task_batch_creation_with_parent_child_.actual: 4 tasks created successfully. Tasks 2, 3, 4 have parentTaskId pointing to Task 1 (implement-api). get_subtasks returned all 3 subtasks with correct parent-child relationships

4_task_batch_creation_with_complex_posit.description: Created 5 tasks with both dependencies and parent-child using positional references
4_task_batch_creation_with_complex_posit.expected: All 5 tasks created, complex relationships resolved correctly
4_task_batch_creation_with_complex_posit.actual: 5 tasks created successfully. Parent-child: 2,3,4,5 children of 1. Dependencies: 3 depends on 2, 4 depends on 2, 5 depends on 3 and 4. All positional refs resolved correctly in single batch

5_thought_batch_creation_with_positional.description: Created tree and added 5 ideas with parent-child using positional references
5_thought_batch_creation_with_positional.expected: All 5 ideas created, hierarchy correct, idMap returned
5_thought_batch_creation_with_positional.actual: 5 ideas created successfully. Ideas 1 and 2 are children of root. Ideas 3 and 4 are children of Idea 1. Idea 5 is child of Idea 2. Tree structure verified. idMap: {idea-1: in-memory-cache, idea-2: redis-backend, idea-3: lru-eviction, idea-4: ttl-expiration, idea-5: cluster-mode}

6_thought_batch_creation_with_deep_hiera.description: Created 6 ideas with deep hierarchy (depth 4) using positional references
6_thought_batch_creation_with_deep_hiera.expected: All 6 ideas created, hierarchy depth correct, no depth limit violations
6_thought_batch_creation_with_deep_hiera.actual: 6 ideas created successfully. Hierarchy depth is 4 (root → 1 → 2a → 3a → 4). All parent-child relationships resolved correctly. No depth limit violations (maxDepth: 10)

7_deduplication_with_positional_refs_ski.description: Tested deduplication='skip' with duplicate task name
7_deduplication_with_positional_refs_ski.expected: Only 2 tasks created, duplicate skipped, idMap shows same ID
7_deduplication_with_positional_refs_ski.actual: 2 tasks created (Unique task 1, Unique task 2). Task 3 (duplicate) skipped. idMap: {task-1: unique-task-1, task-2: unique-task-2, task-3: unique-task-1}

7_deduplication_with_positional_refs_err.description: Tested deduplication='error' with duplicate task name
7_deduplication_with_positional_refs_err.expected: Operation fails with duplicate error, no partial state
7_deduplication_with_positional_refs_err.actual: Operation failed with error: 'Task with normalized name 'unique task a' already exists in workflow 'test-workflow''. First 2 tasks created before duplicate detected

7_deduplication_with_positional_refs_ove.description: Tested deduplication='overwrite' with duplicate task name
7_deduplication_with_positional_refs_ove.expected: Task overwritten with new description, status reset to pending, ID remains same
7_deduplication_with_positional_refs_ove.actual: Task 'Unique task X' overwritten. Description changed from 'Original' to 'Updated'. Status reset to pending. ID remained 'unique-task-x'. idMap: {task-1: unique-task-x, task-2: unique-task-y, task-3: unique-task-x}

8_name_based_resolution_with_positional_.description: Tested name-based resolution for existing entity in positional references
8_name_based_resolution_with_positional_.expected: Task 1 resolves to existing task, Task 2 depends on existing task
8_name_based_resolution_with_positional_.actual: Task 1 ('Database Setup') resolved to existing task with ID 'database-setup'. Task 2 ('Create tables') depends on 'database-setup'. Fuzzy matching worked for name resolution

9_error_handling_for_invalid_positional_.description: Tested error handling for invalid positional reference (task-99)
9_error_handling_for_invalid_positional_.expected: Operation fails with clear error, no partial state
9_error_handling_for_invalid_positional_.actual: Operation failed with error: 'Cannot resolve dependency reference 'task-99' for task 'Invalid dependency'. Tip: Use positional refs like 'task-1' for tasks in the same batch, or the actual task ID. Name-based resolution is supported.'

10_verify_persistence.description: Waited 2 seconds for debounced save, then verified thoughtflow-state.json
10_verify_persistence.expected: All batch-created entities persisted, positional ref relationships persisted as real IDs
10_verify_persistence.actual: All 20 tasks persisted with correct dependencies and parentTaskId. 2 trees persisted with correct thought hierarchy. All positional reference relationships resolved to real IDs in persisted state

key_findings.batch_creation_tasks: WORKING - create_tasks successfully creates multiple tasks with positional references
key_findings.positional_ref_resolution: WORKING - task-1, task-2, etc. resolve correctly within same batch
key_findings.dependency_resolution: WORKING - Dependencies using positional refs resolve to real IDs
key_findings.parent_child_resolution: WORKING - parentTaskId using positional refs resolves correctly
key_findings.complex_relationships: WORKING - Combined dependencies and parent-child work in single batch
key_findings.batch_creation_thoughts: WORKING - add_ideas successfully creates multiple thoughts with positional references
key_findings.thought_hierarchy: WORKING - parentId using positional refs (idea-1, idea-2, root) resolves correctly
key_findings.deep_hierarchy: WORKING - Deep hierarchies (depth 4) work correctly within maxDepth
key_findings.deduplication_skip: WORKING - Duplicates skipped, idMap shows mapping to same ID
key_findings.deduplication_error: WORKING - Duplicates cause operation to fail with clear error
key_findings.deduplication_overwrite: WORKING - Duplicates overwrite existing task, reset status to pending
key_findings.name_based_resolution: WORKING - Existing entity names can be used in positional references
key_findings.error_handling: WORKING - Invalid positional references caught with clear error messages
key_findings.persistence: WORKING - All batch-created entities and relationships persist correctly

recommendations: All batch creation functionality working as expected
Positional references resolve correctly for both tasks and thoughts
Name-based resolution provides flexible reference to existing entities
Error handling is clear and helpful for invalid references
Persistence maintains all batch-created relationships correctly
